foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Understanding sterilization, disinfection and aseptic technique is fundamental to preventing surgical site infections

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Understanding the immune response, inflammatory cascade and body defense mechanisms is fundamental to comprehending surgical infection pathogenesis

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Uncontrolled surgical infections progress to sepsis and septic shock requiring source control, antibiotics and hemodynamic support

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Burn wounds are highly susceptible to infection (Pseudomonas, MRSA) which is the leading cause of mortality in burn patients

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Surgical infections disrupt normal wound healing; SSI is the most common cause of wound dehiscence and delayed healing

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Gas gangrene (Clostridial myonecrosis) is a life-threatening surgical infection requiring emergency debridement and high-dose penicillin

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Surgical antibiotic prophylaxis timing and choice is a key perioperative intervention to reduce SSI rates

objectives: SU6.1: Define and describe the aetiology and pathogenesis of surgical
SU6.2: Enumerate Prophylactic and therapeutic antibiotics
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Surgical Infections across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
